CHEM UL (3 credits)

GenEd (3 credits)

Elective (6 credits)

Chemistry Major, Spring Senior Year (15 Credits)

CHEM 401 (3 credits) Inorganic Chemistry

An overview of basic concepts of the electronic structure of the elements, chemical bonding and reactivity, from simple diatomic molecules to coordination compounds. These are viewed from simple (Lewis) to the most comprehensive molecular orbital theory. Symmetry and group theory are used throughout the course. (Spring semester only.)
